title: dispatch economics: logical/requested/effective model split on every dispatch record (GH #22 P1-6, D3)
action: Extend logDispatch in hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs (+ .bee/bin mirror; note the guard main() is now a thin wrapper over the g22-1 lib — put shared field derivation in the lib) so every record carries the D3 economics fields WITHOUT touching the legacy transport key (advisor R3): keep transport as-is (enforcement vocab), add channel ('claude-agent'|'codex-native'|'cli-exec'), logical_tier, requested_model, effective_model (null unless proven), effective_model_status ('pinned' only for claude model-param dispatches; 'inherited-or-unknown' for codex-native; 'unverified' otherwise), enforcement ('model-param'|'prompt-budget'|'cli-command'). Codex-native never claims a pinned model on 0.144.4. Fields additive — legacy consumers keep working. hooks/test_model_guard.mjs gains per-branch economics assertions. Align dispatch-prepare's economics output with the same shared helper. swarming-reference.md gains a short economics note (config names the REQUESTED model; codex-native effective model is inherited-or-unknown until probed).

truths: every guard-logged dispatch record carries the six economics fields with honest values per branch
codex-native records always say effective_model_status inherited-or-unknown / enforcement prompt-budget
claude model-param dispatches say pinned; bare-marker budget dispatches say unverified/prompt-budget
legacy consumers of dispatch.jsonl keep working (fields additive)
model-guard tests cover each branch's economics

verify: node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node scripts/test_dispatch_prepare.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs

trace.outcome: Every dispatch record now carries the honest economics split via one shared deriveEconomics (channel field, legacy keys untouched); codex-native never claims a pinned model; prepare aligned and corrected
trace.verification_evidence:
# g22-2 — done report (dispatch economics split)

Worker: g22-2-worker (sonnet, isolated worktree, rebased onto e784665).
Worker commit `dd0f0c2`, merged into main clean. 2026-07-19.

## What shipped
- `deriveEconomics()` in dispatch-guard.mjs (single shared mapping, 6 copies
  mirrored): claude+param → pinned (effective_model = the param — corrects
  g22-1's hardcoded null); claude marker-only → unverified (corrects g22-1's
  inherited-or-unknown, now reserved for codex); codex-native →
  inherited-or-unknown ALWAYS; cli-exec → unverified, requested_model null.
- logDispatch gains the fields additively (allow AND deny paths); legacy
  transport/model/tier/subagent_type untouched (advisor R3 honored).
- dispatch-prepare uses the shared helper; test_dispatch_prepare grew to
  17/17 incl. the corrected semantics.
- test_model_guard extended with 5 per-branch economics rows; all legacy
  rows green. swarming-reference gains the economics paragraph.

dispatch_prepare 17/17; lib_mirror 4/4; manifest 362 match →
G222_VERIFY_GREEN.
